Some in the Swift community have suggested adding [moveNext()](https://forums.swift.org/t/pitch-unkeyeddecodingcontainer-movenext-to-skip-items-in-deserialization/22151/16){:target="_blank"}, but it is not yet implemented in the current version.*

translations.- **DecodeIfPresent:** Decode only occur:
- **DecodeIfPresent:** Decode only happens if the response includes the data field (when the Codable property is Optional).

- **Decode:** Perform the decode operation; if the response lacks the data field, it will throw an error.
translations.- `.secondsSince1970/.millisecondsSince1:
- `.secondsSince1970/.millisecondsSince1970` : Unix timestamp

- `.deferredToDate` : Apple's timestamp, rarely used, different from Unix timestamp, counted from 2001/01/01

- `.iso8601` : ISO 8601 date format

- `.formatted(DateFormatter)` : Decode Date according to the provided DateFormatter

- `.custom` : Custom Date decode logic
translations.1. Clear Responsibility: Entity for JSON:
1. Clear Responsibility: Entity for JSON String to Decodable, Model for Business Logic

2. You can clearly see which fields are mapped just by looking at the Entity.

3. Avoid putting all fields together when there are many.

4. **Objective-C is also supported** (because Model is just NSObject or struct/Decodable, which are not visible in Objective-C).

5. Business logic and fields for internal use should be placed in the Model.
translations.1. The field types (struct/class/enum) w:
1. The field types (struct/class/enum) within the Decodable Protocol must all conform to the Decodable Protocol; alternatively, values can be assigned during the init decoder.

2. Decoding fails when field types do not match.

3. If a field in a Decodable object is set as Optional, it means the field is optional and will be decoded only if present.

4. Optional fields can accept: JSON string with no field, or given but set to nil.

5. Blank or 0 is not equal to nil; nil is nil. Be cautious with weakly typed backend APIs!

6. By default, if a Decodable object has a non-optional enum property, decoding will fail if the JSON string does not provide a value for it (handling this will be explained later).

7. By default, decoding failure will immediately stop the process and cannot simply skip the erroneous data (methods to handle this will be explained later).

Some in the Swift community have suggested adding [moveNext()](https://forums.swift.org/t/pitch-unkeyeddecodingcontainer-movenext-to-skip-items-in-deserialization/22151/16){:target="_blank"}, but it is not yet implemented in the current version.*
translations.Decodable Object 中欄位設為 Optional 的話則為可有可無: If a field in a Decodable object is set as Optional, it means the field is optional and will be decoded only if present.
translations.Decodable Protocol 內的的欄位類型(struct/class/: The field types (struct/class/enum) within the Decodable Protocol must all conform to the Decodable Protocol; alternatively, values can be assigned during the init decoder.
translations.Optional 欄位可接受: JSON String 無欄位、有給但給 nil: Optional fields can accept: JSON string with no field, or given but set to nil
translations.Restkit 幾乎幫我們處理完所有網路請求相關會需要到的功能，從基本的網路處理: Restkit almost handles all the features needed for network requests, from basic network handling, API calls, network processing, to response handling like JSON String to Object, and even saving objects into Core Data. It’s a truly powerful framework that can do the work of ten.

```swift
    var count: Int
    var offset: Int
    var limit: Int
    var results: [E]
}
```

translations.到此為止基本的使用已經完成了，但現實世界不會那麼簡單；以下列舉幾個進階會遇到的場: So far, the basic usage is complete, but the real world is not that simple; below are several advanced scenarios and applicable Codable solutions. From this point on, we can no longer rely on the default Decode to handle mapping for us and must implement `init(from decoder: Decoder)` to customize the decoding process.

translations.原理差不多，但這邊先使用 `nestedContainer` 衝進去 `targ: The principle is similar, but here we first use `nestedContainer` to access `targetObject` and get the `type` to determine which type `targetObject` should be decoded into.
translations.另外一種方式是設定 JSONDecoder 的 keyDecodingStrat: Another approach is to set the JSONDecoder's keyDecodingStrategy. If the response data fields differ from the property names only by `snake_case` <-> `camelCase`, you can directly set `.keyDecodingStrategy` = `.convertFromSnakeCase` to automatically handle the mapping.
translations.回到原本的範例 JSON String。\n\n: Back to the original example JSON String.
translations.因應後端 API 升級需要調整 API 處理架構，近期趁這個機會一併將原本使用: Due to the backend API upgrade, we needed to adjust the API handling architecture. Recently, we took this opportunity to update the original network handling architecture, which was written in Objective-C, to Swift. Because of the language difference, it’s no longer suitable to use the original [Restkit](https://github.com/RestKit/RestKit){:target="_blank"} to manage the network layer. However, we must admit that Restkit’s features are very comprehensive and powerful. It worked smoothly in our project with almost no major issues. On the downside, it is very heavy, barely maintained, and purely Objective-C; it will inevitably need to be replaced in the future.
translations.如前述，Decodable 預設是所有資料剖析都正確才能 Mapping 輸出；: As mentioned earlier, Decodable by default requires all data parsing to be correct in order to map the output; sometimes the backend provides unstable data, giving a long array where a few entries are missing fields or have mismatched field types causing Decode to fail; this results in the entire batch failing and returning nil.
translations.存取、Decode 不同階層的物件，範例展示 target/items 使用 n: Accessing and decoding objects at different levels: the example shows using nestedContainer on target/items to extract the type, then decode accordingly based on the type.

translations.我們將 `targetObject` 的屬性換成 Associated Valu: We replace the properties of `targetObject` with an Associated Value Enum, deciding the content inside the Enum only during decoding.
translations.改宣告欄位屬性為 Base Class。\n\n: Change the declared property to a Base Class.
translations.文中場景、範例或許有些很極端，但有時候遇到了也沒辦法；當然希望一般情況下單純的: Some scenarios or examples in the article might be extreme, but sometimes you just have to deal with them; of course, we hope that simple Codable can meet our needs in most cases. However, with the techniques above, there should be no problem that can't be solved!

translations.核心實踐是建立一個符合 Decodable 的 Enum 做為容器，decode: The core practice is to create a Decodable-compliant Enum as a container. During decoding, first extract the key field (the `type` field in the example JSON string) to determine the type. If it is `Song`, use a singleValueContainer to decode the entire package into a `SongEntity`; if it is `User`, do the same accordingly.
translations.欄位類型不相符時會 Decode 失敗\n: Decoding Fails When Field Types Do Not Match
translations.權責分明，Entity: JSON String to Decodable, M: Clear Responsibility: Entity for JSON String to Decodable, Model for Business Logic
translations.由上範例我們可以拆成：User/Song/Comment 三個 Entity &: From the above example, we can split into three Entities & Models: User, Song, and Comment, allowing for reusable composition. For convenience, the Entity and Model are written in the same file for demonstration.
translations.當我們的 JSON String Key Name 與 Entity Objec: When our JSON string key names do not match the entity object's property names, we can add a CodingKeys enum internally to map them, since the backend data source's naming convention is beyond our control.
translations.空白、0 不等於 nil，nil 是 nil；弱型別的後端 API 需注意！\n: Blank, 0 is not equal to nil; nil is nil. Be cautious with weakly typed backend APIs!
translations.結合上述提到的 `nestedUnkeyedContainer` +場景1. 的: Combine the previously mentioned `nestedUnkeyedContainer` with the solution from Scenario 1; here, you can also use **Scenario 1.**'s **a. solution** by accessing values with an Associated Value Enum.
translations.綜合以上基本使用及進階使用的完整範例：\n\n: A complete example combining the basic and advanced usage above:
translations.自訂 Decode 操作時，我們需要從 `decoder` 中取得 `conta: When customizing the Decode operation, we need to get a `container` from the `decoder` to extract values. There are three types of containers to obtain content.
translations.解決方式也類似 **場景2.的解決方案** ； `nestedUnkeyedCo: The solution is similar to **Scenario 2's solution**; use `nestedUnkeyedContainer` to iterate through each item and perform a try? Decode. If the Decode fails, use an Empty Decode to allow the `nestedUnkeyedContainer` internal pointer to continue.
translations.這邊就要提一開始說的，我們拆分 Entity/Model 的功用了；Entity: Here we need to mention the purpose of splitting Entity and Model as stated at the beginning; Entity is solely responsible for JSON String to Entity (Decodable) mapping; Model initializes with Entity, and the actual program passing, operations, and business logic all use Model.
translations.適用不固定類型的陣列欄位。\n\n: Applicable to array fields with variable types.
translations.適用於 Associated Value Enum 欄位類型，例如 name 還: Applicable to Associated Value Enum field types, for example, name also comes with a coolness level!
translations.適用於有限範圍的字串類型，寫成 Enum 方便我們傳遞、使用；若出現為列舉的值會: Suitable for string types with a limited range, writing as an Enum makes it easier for us to pass and use; decoding will fail if the value is not one of the enum cases!
translations.選擇使用 Codable 的好處，第一當然是因為原生，不用怕後續無人維護、還有寫: The main advantage of using Codable is that it's native, so there's no worry about lack of future maintenance, and the code looks clean. However, it has stricter limitations and less flexibility in parsing JSON strings. Otherwise, you need to do more work as shown in this article. Also, its performance is not better than other mapping libraries (Decodable still uses the Objective-C era NSJSONSerialization for parsing). But I believe Apple may optimize this in future updates, so we won't need to change our code then.
translations.避免欄位一多全喇在一起\n: Avoid putting all fields together when there are many
translations.關於 JSON String to Object Mapping 部分，我們使用: Regarding the JSON String to Object Mapping section, we use Swift's built-in Codable (Decodable) protocol and JSONDecoder for processing; we also separate Entity/Model to enhance responsibility division, operation, and readability. Additionally, the codebase mixing Objective-C and Swift must be taken into consideration.
translations.隨著時代的演進，目前的 Framework 已不在主打一個包全部，更多的是靈活、: With the evolution of time, current frameworks no longer focus on an all-in-one package. Instead, they emphasize flexibility, lightweight design, and modularity to create more variations. Therefore, when switching to Swift, we chose Moya as the networking library and combined other needed functionalities through different methods.
translations.預設 Decodable Object 中有列舉且非 Optional 的欄位，: By default, if a Decodable object has an enum property that is non-optional, decoding will fail if the JSON string does not provide a value for it (handling this will be explained later).
translations.預設 遇到 Decode 失敗會直接中斷跳出，無法單純跳過有誤的資料（後續會說明: By default, decoding failure will immediately stop the process and cannot simply skip the erroneous data (methods to handle this will be explained later).
